creator: henrik@gulbra.net
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #5)

Sorry. I need a checklist to remind me that "svn diff" doesn't work well when you have new unadded files. This new patch was generated with plain old "diff", and it seems to work on a fully reverted repo directory, so it should be better:

    https://www.gulbra.net/misc/www_bozohttpd-20201014.patch
